languages.text: {n}Полминуты спустя мужчина поднимает на вас потухший взгляд.{/n} "Лорд-капитан... в эфире сплошные помехи. Я... я не понимаю, почему — все работает исправно. Словно бы что-то глушит связь. Мы не можем вызвать флагман. Судя по картам, здесь недалеко есть поселение местных жителей. Может у них есть вокс помощнее?"

{n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"
languages.original_text: {n}Полминуты спустя мужчина поднимает на вас потухший взгляд.{/n} "Лорд-капитан... в эфире сплошные помехи. Я... я не понимаю, почему — все работает исправно. Словно бы что-то глушит связь. Мы не можем вызвать флагман. Судя по картам, здесь недалеко есть поселение местных жителей. Может у них есть вокс помощнее?"

It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot reach the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

{n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

languages.text: {n}Einen Augenblick später sieht dich der Mann mit leeren Augen an.{/n} "Lord Captain ... Wir haben nichts als Rauschen auf allen Kanälen. Ich ... Ich verstehe nicht warum ... alles funktioniert einwandfrei. Es ist, als würde etwas die Frequenz stören. Wir können das Flaggschiff nicht kontaktieren. Laut Karte gibt es nicht weit von hier eine Siedlung. Vielleicht haben die Einheimischen ja eine stärkere Voxeinheit?"
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Einen Augenblick später sieht dich der Mann mit leeren Augen an.{/n} "Lord Captain ... Wir haben nichts als Rauschen auf allen Kanälen. Ich ... Ich verstehe nicht warum ... alles funktioniert einwandfrei. Es ist, als würde etwas die Frequenz stören. Wir können das Flaggschiff nicht kontaktieren. Laut Karte gibt es nicht weit von hier eine Siedlung. Vielleicht haben die Einheimischen ja eine stärkere Voxeinheit?"

languages.text: {n}Au bout de quelques instants, l'homme vous adresse un regard vide.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}... Il y a de la friture sur tous les canaux. Je... je ne comprends pas pourquoi, les systèmes fonctionnent pourtant normalement. C'est comme si quelque chose brouillait la fréquence. Les communications avec le vaisseau amiral sont coupées. D'après les cartes, il y a une colonie dans les parages. Les habitants possèdent peut-être un système-vox plus puissant ? »
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Au bout de quelques instants, l'homme vous adresse un regard vide.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}... Il y a de la friture sur tous les canaux. Je... je ne comprends pas pourquoi, les systèmes fonctionnent pourtant normalement. C'est comme si quelque chose brouillait la fréquence. Les communications avec le vaisseau amiral sont coupées. D'après les cartes, il y a une colonie dans les parages. Les habitants possèdent peut-être un système-vox plus puissant ? »

languages.text: {n}Al cabo de un instante, el hombre te mira con expresión vacía.{/n} «Lord Capitán... solo recibo estática en todos los canales. No... no entiendo el motivo, todo funciona como es debido. Parece como si algo estuviese interfiriendo en la frecuencia. No podemos contactar con la nave insignia. Según las cartas de navegación, hay un asentamiento cerca de aquí. Tal vez los lugareños dispongan de una unidad de voco más potente».
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Al cabo de un instante, el hombre te mira con expresión vacía.{/n} «Lord Capitán... solo recibo estática en todos los canales. No... no entiendo el motivo, todo funciona como es debido. Parece como si algo estuviese interfiriendo en la frecuencia. No podemos contactar con la nave insignia. Según las cartas de navegación, hay un asentamiento cerca de aquí. Tal vez los lugareños dispongan de una unidad de voco más potente».

languages.text: {n}Bir an sonra adam, boş gözlerle sana bakıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan... Tüm kanallarda sadece cızırtı var. Ben... Nedenini anlamıyorum, her şey kusursuz çalışıyor. Sanki bir şey frekansı bozuyor gibi. Sancak gemisiyle iletişim kuramıyoruz. Haritalara göre yakında bir yerleşim yeri var. Yerli halkın daha güçlü bir voks birimi olabilir belki..."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir an sonra adam, boş gözlerle sana bakıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan... Tüm kanallarda sadece cızırtı var. Ben... Nedenini anlamıyorum, her şey kusursuz çalışıyor. Sanki bir şey frekansı bozuyor gibi. Sancak gemisiyle iletişim kuramıyoruz. Haritalara göre yakında bir yerleşim yeri var. Yerli halkın daha güçlü bir voks birimi olabilir belki..."

languages.text: {n}片刻后，男人用空洞的眼神望着你。{/n}“舰长大人……所有频道都只有静电噪声。我……我不明白为什么，设备明明一切正常。就好像有什么东西在干扰信号。我们无法联系旗舰。根据星图，附近应该有个定居点。也许那里的人有更大功率的音阵单元？”
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

traits.locale_text: {n}片刻后，男人用空洞的眼神望着你。{/n}“舰长大人……所有频道都只有静电噪声。我……我不明白为什么，设备明明一切正常。就好像有什么东西在干扰信号。我们无法联系旗舰。根据星图，附近应该有个定居点。也许那里的人有更大功率的音阵单元？”

languages.text: {n}しばらくして、男は虚ろな目であなたを見つめる。{/n}「ロード・キャプテン様…全ての通信はノイズのみです。何故か分かりませんが、全ては正常に機能しています。何かが周波数を妨害しているようです。旗艦との連絡は取れません。地図によると、近くに集落があります。もしかすると、地元の人たちはより強力なボイスユニットを持っているのかもしれません？」
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment, the man looks at you with hollow eyes.{/n} "Lord Captain... All channels are nothing but static. I... I don't understand why, everything is functioning perfectly. It's as if something is jamming the frequency. We cannot contact the flagship. According to the charts, there is a settlement nearby. Perhaps the locals have a more powerful vox-unit?"

traits.locale_text: {n}しばらくして、男は虚ろな目であなたを見つめる。{/n}「ロード・キャプテン様…全ての通信はノイズのみです。何故か分かりませんが、全ては正常に機能しています。何かが周波数を妨害しているようです。旗艦との連絡は取れません。地図によると、近くに集落があります。もしかすると、地元の人たちはより強力なボイスユニットを持っているのかもしれません？」
